info.title: dataminer-validator
info.description: This .NET tool allows you to validate and compare protocol solutions.

commands.name: compare
commands.description: Compares a DataMiner solution with the previous version.

options.name: --minimum-log-level
options.description: Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information [default: Information]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: compare protocol-solution
commands.description: Compare a protocol solution with the previous version.

options.name: --solution-path
options.description: Path to a solution file (.sln or .slnx) of a DataMiner protocol or a directory that contains a solution file. Note: In case the specified directory contains multiple solution files, you must specify the file path of a specific solution.

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: Path to the directory where the validator results should be stored.

options.name: --output-file-name
options.description: Name of the results file. Note: Do not provide an extension, the extension is automatically added based on the results-output-formats option.

options.name: --output-format
options.description: Specifies the output format. Possible values: JSON, XML, HTML. Specify a space separated list to output multiple formats. [default: JSON|HTML]

options.name: --include-suppressed
options.description: Specifies whether the suppressed results should also be included in the results.

options.name: --previous-protocol-xml-path
options.description: Path to the previous protocol.xml file.

options.name: --catalog-id
options.description: Catalog ID for fetching previous protocol version from the Catalog.

options.name: --catalog-api-key
options.description: Catalog API key for fetching previous protocol version from the Catalog. Can also be set with the environment variable DATAMINER_TOKEN. Required when not providing a previous protocol XML file.

options.name: --minimum-log-level
options.description: Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information [default: Information]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --perform-restore
options.description: Specifies whether to perform a dotnet restore operation. [default: True]

options.name: --restore-timeout
options.description: Specifies the timeout for the restore operation (in ms). [default: 300000]

options.name: --minimum-log-level
